result.finding: Spring Boot default Logback logging via SLF4J. Spring Boot Actuator provides built-in metrics and health monitoring. No custom AOP aspects, external APM agents, or telemetry frameworks detected.
evidence: No logback.xml or logback-spring.xml found - uses Spring Boot default Logback auto-configuration
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=* in application.properties exposes all Actuator endpoints
No @Aspect, @Before, @After, or @Around annotations found in any Java source files
No AspectJ, OpenTelemetry, Application Insights, New Relic, Datadog, or Elastic APM dependencies in pom.xml
No Logger.getLogger or LoggerFactory.getLogger calls found in main application code
jacoco-maven-plugin configured for test code coverage (not runtime telemetry)
values: Logback (via Spring Boot auto-configuration, SLF4J API)
Spring Boot Actuator (metrics, health, info endpoints)
